'''''Shadows of the Empire'' 3''' was the third issue in the six-part [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] series of comics, and was released on [[July 1]], [[1996]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''They outnumber him and outgun him. By all rights, Luke Skywalker should be one dead Jedi-in-training, the target of a surprise attack by Jabba's swoop gang. But he's not… and even he isn't certain of the reason!''
